Manage and search bookmarks for the current domain

Master Your Browser Bookmarks, Notes, and Reminders

Domain Bookmarks is a comprehensive browser productivity suite. It organizes your bookmarks by domain, lets you attach sticky notes to any webpage, and reminds you to revisit pages at exactly the right time, all without leaving your browser.

Core Features

★ Domain-Aware Bookmark Search
Open the popup on any site and instantly see every bookmark saved for that domain. Global search spans all folders with zero delay. Sort, bulk-select, and delete from a clean table view.

★ On-Page Sticky Notes
Attach virtual sticky notes to any webpage right from the context menu.

- Right-click any page → Add Note to create a note exactly where your cursor is.
- Notes persist per domain and reappear automatically on your next visit.
- Resize freely (drag the bottom-right handle to any size), change colors, and pin notes so they show on every page of a site.
- Notes autosave as you type your content is never lost even if you close the tab mid-edit.
- Manage all notes from the centralized Notes dashboard in the Options page.

★  Bookmark Reminders
Never forget to follow up on an important link again.

- Quick reminders from the context menu: right-click any page → Set Reminder → pick a duration (1 hour, Tomorrow, 3 days, 1 week).
- Full reminder dialog from the popup: one-time, recurring (daily / weekly / monthly), or revisit-monitoring reminders.
- Notifications appear as in-tab toasts when your browser is open a clean slide-in card at the top-right with an action button. If your browser is minimized or no tab is reachable, a native OS notification fires as fallback.
- Snooze notifications by 1 hour or 1 day directly from the native notification.

★ Smart Cleanup and Organization
- Duplicate Bookmark Remover: find and remove duplicate URLs.
- Empty Folder Pruning: identify and remove empty folders.
- Link Health Checker: scan saved links for broken or unreachable URLs.
- Trash Bin Recovery: deleted bookmarks are held for 7 days and fully restorable.

★ Comprehensive Bookmark Statistics
- Bookmarking velocity over the last 8 weeks.
- Age distribution of saved links.
- Top Level Domain breakdown.
- Most active folders and unique domains.
- Oldest bookmarks that may need a review.

★  Fast and Keyboard-Friendly
- Press / to search, j/k to navigate, Enter to open, e to edit, Esc to go back. Full dark mode. Multi-language support.

★ Pro Features
Upgrade to Pro for the full experience:

- Unlimited notes (free tier: up to 10)
- Rich text notes: Markdown rendering with bold, italic, code blocks, lists, and headings
- Revisit reminders: monitor a URL and get notified when it becomes available
- Recurring reminders: daily, weekly, or monthly on a custom schedule
- Unlimited active reminders (free tier: up to 5)

★  Required Permissions
- Tabs: Read the current tab's domain to show relevant bookmarks and deliver in-tab reminder notifications.
- Bookmarks: Read, search, create, edit, and delete bookmarks and folders.
- Clipboard Write: Copy a bookmark URL with one click.
- Storage: Save settings, sticky notes, reminders, labels, and Trash bin state.
- Alarms: Fire bookmark reminders at the right time and run periodic Trash cleanup.
- Context Menus: Add "Add Note" and "Set Reminder" to your right-click menu.
- Notifications: Show native OS notifications when the browser is minimized or a tab can't receive in-tab toasts.
Scans and cleans suspicious website notification permissions. Protects against spam and scam ads in real-time.

Are you tired of receiving fake virus alerts, click-bait advertisements, and adult content notifications on your desktop? Deceptive websites often trick you into clicking "Allow Notifications" using fake captcha prompts or urgent security warnings. Once allowed, they flood you with annoying spam popups.

NotiSpam Cleaner is a privacy-first, lightweight tool designed to scan and clean notification settings in Google Chrome, protecting you from notification abuse.

KEY FEATURES & BENEFITS
- 100% Privacy-First & Open-Source (Security & Transparency):
All scans and blocks are processed strictly on your local machine. Absolutely zero data is collected or sent off-device. As a fully open-source extension (MIT License), our code is publicly hosted on GitHub for anyone to audit and verify.
GitHub Repository: https://github.com/mah-jp/notispam-cleaner

- Scan & One-Click Clean:
Instantly audit your allowed notifications list. The extension automatically separates "Trusted" sites (like Google, Slack, Teams) from "Suspicious/Unknown" ones, letting you revoke permissions from all suspicious sites at once while keeping your trusted ones intact.

- Real-Time Guard & Silent Protection:
Actively monitors notification permission changes. When a suspicious site gets allowed, the extension detects it instantly and blocks it. Includes a "Silent Protection" mode to auto-block notifications in the background without showing any alerts—ideal for family members' PCs.

HOW TO USE IT
1. Click the NotiSpam Cleaner icon in your toolbar.
2. Click "Scan Allowed Sites" to analyze notification permissions.
3. Review "Suspicious / Unknown" sites and click "Clean All Suspicious Sites" to block them.
4. Keep the "Real-time Guard" toggle active to get alert popups if you accidentally allow a suspicious site in the future.

IMPORTANT NOTES & LIMITATIONS
- Not an Adblocker: This extension specifically blocks annoying popups generated through Chrome's native push notifications. It is not designed to block general web page advertisements (like banners or video ads).
- Technical Limitation: Due to Chrome security constraints, extensions cannot retrieve a bulk list of all custom notification settings. NotiSpam Cleaner discovers sites by cross-referencing allowed rules with your local history, bookmarks, and open tabs. Very old allowed sites that are no longer in your history or bookmarks may not be scanned. You can view the full raw database link inside the extension to review all rules manually.
A sleek bookmark manager in your browser sidebar.

URLflows Workspace — your bookmarks, organized.

Tired of a cluttered tab bar and a bookmarks bar you outgrew years ago? URLflows Workspace puts the links you actually use into a clean side panel that's always one click away — no digging through nested folders, no tabs lost in a sea of forty others.

WHAT IT IS

A bookmark manager that lives in your browser's side panel (or as a floating window, your choice). Built for people who switch contexts all day — product folks, engineers, designers, students, writers, anyone who lives in the browser.

WHAT IT DOES

Keep your daily links in one place, grouped into sections you control. Drag a tab into a section to bookmark it. Click any link to open it the way you want — new tab, popup, or app window with a custom size. Wipe your tab clutter in seconds by replacing every open tab with a saved set of links. And the more you use it, the smarter it gets — your most-clicked links surface automatically at the top.

WHY INSTALL IT

The native Chrome bookmarks system is powerful but slow to navigate. The bookmarks bar runs out of room fast. Pinned tabs lock things in place but eat up tab space. A separate browser profile is overkill when all you want is "my work links, right here, easy to reach."

URLflows fills that gap. Focused, fast, out of the way when you don't need it.

KEY FEATURES

Sections and dividers
Group related links into sections you can rename and reorder. Add labelled dividers inside a section to break up sub-groups.

Save Tabs
Capture every open tab in your current window as a brand-new section, stamped with the date and time. Great for "save this research before I close it" moments.

Refocus Tabs
Define sets of essential links — like "Morning Standup", "Deep Work", or "On-Call Triage" — and replace your current tab clutter with that set in one click.

Top Bookmarks
Your most-clicked links rise automatically to a section at the top. No setup required.

Drag and drop everything
Reorder links and sections by dragging. Drop a tab from your browser into a section to bookmark it. Drop a URL from anywhere — Slack, Notion, an email — and it lands as a new bookmark.

Live search
Filter your entire library as you type. Matches by title or URL.

20+ themes
Tokyo Night, Dracula, Solarized, Nord, Catppuccin, Synthwave, Matrix, Cyberpunk, Sepia, Mint, Forest, and more. Switch any time without leaving the sidebar.

Floating pop-out window
Prefer a window to a side panel? Pop out a floating window that mirrors your sidebar exactly.

Temp Notes
A scratchpad pinned to the sidebar for quick jots that don't deserve a full notes app. Resize it, hide it, move it to the top — your call.

Push to Mobile
One click copies your sections into Chrome's bookmark folder so they show up on your phone via Chrome Sync.

Backup and restore
Download a single file with everything — bookmarks, sections, settings. Restore on any device, after a clean install, or to share your setup with someone else.

Multi-profile friendly
Tag each backup file with a label like "work" or "personal" so files from different setups don't get confused.

Density and font controls
Compact, normal, or comfortable spacing. Pick a font that fits your taste.

Per-link open behaviour
Tell each bookmark how to open — new tab, specific tab position, popup, or app window with custom width and height. Set it once and forget it.

Loaded with example data
First time? Hit "Load Example Data" and start with a curated set of 100+ links across AI tools, product management, engineering management, React/Next.js, Ruby on Rails, daily essentials, and tech news. Tweak from there.

PRIVACY

Your bookmarks, sections, themes, and notes live entirely on your own device. Nothing is uploaded, sold, or shared. Anonymous usage stats are off by default — flip them on in Settings only if you want to help us learn which features matter most. No accounts, no logins, no tracking.

Free. Open. No subscription. No upsells.

Get back to a tidy browser. Install URLflows Workspace.

JourneyAL - The browser extension companion for JourneyAL, for Chrome. Look up information in the blink of an eye. Tame your tabs. Organize your online life. Never lose a bookmark. Across multiple devices. Your Journey across the web.

This is the browser extension companion for JourneyAL, for Chrome. If your tabs are out of control, bookmarks are spread across multiple devices, history is unsearchable, and your search engine results leave much to be desired because you can't find the page you were just looking at this extension is for you.

JourneyAL is a service with a one time fee because we believe software should be something you pay for once and own. Right now that software is provided via a web service but in the future our plan is to make a self hosted version as well.

The functionality is basic.

This extension will:

- Determine if the page should be saved or not
- Take a snapshot of the current page you're on
- Collect the images of the current page you're on
- Upload both of them to the web service
- If you save a bookmark locally, that page will be marked as a bookmark on the JourneyAL web service


The web service shows you full text searchable log of your browsing history across every device where the extension is installed. In addition it shows the images which are searchable based on the same keywords, and the bookmarks as well.
The web service also allows you to manage a block list of pages you don't want saved.

We created this service because our tabs are out of control, history search is not accurate in any of the browsers we use, and information that we rely on has been disappearing from search engines.

Important notes:
This extension will record your browsing history, if there is a page you do not want to be recorded we highly encourage the use of an Incognito Window.
Do not enable this extension to capture Incognito Window activity.

Live grep through bookmarks with LazySth like interface using leader key

# LazyBookmark - nvim-telescope inspired bookmark manager with AI summaries

Transform your bookmark management with a keyboard-first, developer-friendly interface inspired by LazyVim and nvim-telescope.

## 🚀 KEY FEATURES

• **Quick Access Leader Palette** - Press Ctrl+Shift+L (Cmd+Shift+L on Mac) to instantly access all bookmark operations

• **Live Grep Search** - Search through bookmarks with regex support and real-time filtering

• **AI-Powered Summaries** - Preview pane with automatic page summaries using Chrome's built-in Gemini Nano AI

• **Keyboard-Centric Navigation** - Navigate with j/k, h/l keys for efficient workflow

• **Quick Bookmark Add** - Press 'a' in leader palette to instantly bookmark current page

• **Tree View Manager** - Press 'b' to open full bookmark manager with add, edit, and delete actions

## ⌨️ KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS

• Ctrl+Shift+L / Cmd+Shift+L: Open leader palette
• g: Search bookmarks
• a: Quick add current page
• b: Open bookmark manager
• j/k: Navigate up/down
• h/l: Navigate left/right
• Enter: Select
• q: Close

## 🤖 AI FEATURES

Uses Chrome's built-in Gemini Nano model to generate intelligent summaries of your bookmarked pages. The AI runs entirely locally on your device for complete privacy.

## ⚠️ REQUIREMENTS

• Chrome version 138 or later
• Enable "Summarization API for Gemini Nano" flag at chrome://flags/#summarization-api-for-gemini-nano

## 🔒 PRIVACY

• Runs entirely locally in your browser
• No data collection or transmission
• Only accesses bookmarks when telescope is opened
• AI processing happens on-device

Perfect for developers, power users, and anyone who prefers keyboard navigation over mouse clicks!
Your forgotten bookmarks, gently resurfaced. One at a time.

You saved those bookmarks for a reason.

Most of them are buried now — articles you meant to read, tools you wanted to try, ideas you thought you'd come back to. They sit in folders you forgot existed.

Living Bookmarks changes that. Quietly.

WHAT IT DOES

Click the extension icon in your toolbar. Living Bookmarks shows you one bookmark from your collection. Just one. You decide what to do with it:

• Keep — it won't appear again for 30 days
• Remove — delete it permanently and move on

That's the whole experience.

WHY IT MATTERS

• Rediscover things you saved months or years ago
• Declutter your bookmarks without a massive cleanup session
• Stay intentional about what you keep

HOW IT WORKS

1. Install the extension
2. Click the icon in your toolbar
3. See one bookmark
4. Keep or remove it
5. Come back tomorrow

No setup. No configuration. No learning curve.

FREE VS PREMIUM

Free — 4 bookmarks per day with a 30-day cooldown on kept bookmarks. That's enough for most people.

Premium ($4.99, one-time lifetime purchase) — unlimited daily bookmarks, smart resurfacing that surfaces your oldest bookmarks first, rapid cleanup mode for those days when you want to tidy up, and configurable cooldown periods.

PRIVACY

Living Bookmarks works entirely within your browser. Your bookmarks are never sent anywhere. There are no analytics, no tracking, no data collection. The only external connection is to our payment provider (Stripe) if you choose to upgrade. Nothing else leaves your machine.

The ultimate command palette for Chrome. Search tabs, bookmarks, and history instantly.

SpotLine is a minimalist productivity tool designed to eliminate the friction of managing a high volume of open tabs. Instead of visually scanning your tab bar or relying on sequential shortcuts, SpotLine lets you jump directly to any open resource or bookmark by simply typing a few characters.

Core Features:

1. High-Performance Fuzzy Search
- Optimized algorithm delivers results in under 30ms, even with hundreds of entries.
- Gracefully handles typos and intelligently prioritizes exact matches and recent activity.

2. Keyboard-Centric Workflow
- Activate the palette via a customizable shortcut (default: Ctrl+Q).
- Select, switch, and close tabs exclusively via the keyboard, so you never have to leave the home row.

3. Customizable Interface
- Includes built-in themes (Dark, Light, Dracula, Nord, Catppuccin).
- Visual editor to adapt interface colors to your workspace requirements.

4. Privacy and Security
- Operates entirely offline: no data ever leaves your browser.
- No external API calls, telemetry, or tracking.
- All processing happens locally within your browser's sandbox.

5. Open Source
- Transparent project with source code available on the GitHub repository: haksolot/SpotLine.

---

Why Choose SpotLine?
- Save time: Access your tabs in an instant.
- Privacy-first: No data collection.
- Flexible: Customize the tool to fit your needs.

Easy Bookmark Searcher
Stop digging through folders. Find your saved gems exactly where you search.

We’ve all been there: you know…

Easy Bookmark Searcher
Stop digging through folders. Find your saved gems exactly where you search.

We’ve all been there: you know you bookmarked that perfect article or tool months ago, but finding it in your browser’s "Bookmark Manager" feels like a chore. Easy Bookmark Searcher bridges the gap between your saved wisdom and your daily search habits.

How It Works
When you perform a search on your favorite search engine (like Google or Bing), Easy Bookmark Searcher works quietly in the background. It instantly scans your local bookmarks for relevant matches and displays a clean, non-intrusive list right on the results page.

It’s like having a personal librarian who reminds you, "Hey, you already saved something for this!"
This works for google Chrome, Yahoo, Duckduckgo, Bing, and brave search.

Tabease — visual tab management cognitive AI workspace for Chrome. Organise tabs, ideas, and workflows on an interactive canvas.

🔍 Revolutionize the way you use your browser by questioning the hypothesis that tabs are necessary in the first place.

Tabs lose their identity when they’re clumped up, with barely a trace of the site icon. They become a chaotic mess—like loose files scattered across a desk, with no organization, no trace, and no clarity. And worse, they slow your browser to a crawl, devouring memory and killing your productivity.

⚠️ The Problem with Tabs (and Why Current Solutions Fall Short)

Most browsers and extensions try to bandage the problem with half-measures:

📁 Tab Grouping: Still manual, still cluttered, and still requires you to remember where everything is.

💾 Session Management: Saves your tabs, but doesn’t solve the chaos—just freezes it in time.

👤 Profile Management: Forces you to switch contexts, breaking your workflow.

📐 Vertical Tabs: Just a sideways reshuffle of the same problem—tabs still pile up, still lose meaning, still slow you down.

These solutions treat the symptoms, not the disease. They ask you to adapt, instead of adapting to you.

🚀 TabEase: The first Browser Tab Manager That Tracks Your Flow

TabEase doesn’t just organize your tabs—it reimagines them. Here’s how:

✅ Visual, Automatic Organization: Tabs arrange themselves intuitively, so you always know where everything is—without lifting a finger.

🧠 Zero Cognitive Load: No manual grouping, no digging through menus, no mental gymnastics. Your browser works for you, not against you.

⚡ Lightning-Fast Performance: By eliminating tab bloat, TabEase keeps your browser lean, mean, and blazingly fast.

🔌 Seamless, Plug-and-Play: Install it, and it just works. No setup. No learning curve. No friction.

This isn’t just tab management—it’s flow preservation. TabEase lets you focus on what matters, not on finding what matters.

📈 The Productivity Gain You’ve Been Missing

Imagine:

😌 No more tab anxiety. Every tab has a place, and every place has a purpose.

🐇 No more slowdowns. Your browser stays snappy, even with dozens of tabs open.

🔄 No more context-switching. Your workflow stays uninterrupted, your mind stays in the zone.

TabEase doesn’t just make browsing easier—it makes it effortless.

✅ Try it once. You’ll never go back.
Read Chrome bookmarks and export them as 1Bookmark JSON.

1Bookmark Importer 用于把 Chrome 浏览器中的书签快速导入到 1Bookmark。

为什么值得安装：

1、Chrome 原生书签在数量变多后，查找和整理会越来越困难。
- 1Bookmark 会把你的书签转换成更适合浏览和分类管理的导航页面。
- 安装扩展后，你不需要手动导出和整理书签，只要点击一次，就可以把当前 Chrome 书签导入到 1Bookmark。

2、它能做什么：
- 在你主动点击时读取 Chrome 书签
- 保留书签的标题、链接和文件夹分类结构
- 把书签转换成 1Bookmark 可用的数据格式
- 支持一键导入到 1Bookmark 页面
- 也支持导出 JSON，方便你自己备份或迁移

3、适合谁安装：

- Chrome 书签很多、但平时很难找到常用网站的人
- 希望把浏览器书签整理成导航页的人
- 想更方便管理个人网站入口、工具收藏和常用资源的人

4、权限说明：

- 1bookmarks：仅用于在你主动触发导入或导出时读取书签树。
- 扩展不会为了广告、画像或跨站跟踪而读取你的书签。

1Bookmark Importer helps you quickly bring your Chrome bookmarks into 1Bookmark.

1.Why install it:

- As your Chrome bookmarks grow, they become harder to search, organize, and revisit.
- 1Bookmark turns your bookmarks into a cleaner, easier-to-browse navigation page.
With this extension installed, you do not need to manually export and reorganize bookmarks. Just click once to import your current Chrome bookmarks into 1Bookmark.

2.What it does:

- Reads your Chrome bookmarks only when you explicitly trigger the action
- Keeps bookmark titles, links, and folder structure
- Converts bookmarks into the format used by 1Bookmark
- Supports one-click import directly into your 1Bookmark page
- Also supports JSON export for backup or migration

3.Who should install it:

- People who have too many Chrome bookmarks and find them difficult to manage
- People who want to turn browser bookmarks into a clean navigation page
- People who want a simpler way to organize frequently used sites, tools, and saved resources

4.Permission explanation:

- bookmarks: required only to read your bookmark tree when you explicitly trigger import or export
- The extension does not read your bookmarks for advertising, profiling, or cross-site tracking
A beautiful, fast, and privacy-first New Tab dashboard to organize and monitor your bookmark folders.

martabs is a lightweight, privacy-first browser extension that replaces your default New Tab page with a customizable bookmark dashboard. Designed for users with large bookmark collections, it allows you to search, organize, tag, and style your workspace completely offline—without telemetry or external connections.

🎨 DESIGN & CUSTOMIZATION
• Premium Glassmorphic UI: Frosted glass panels that automatically adjust to your wallpaper.
• Custom Wallpapers: Upload up to 3 local images (IndexedDB secure storage) with random rotation, brightness, and surface opacity controls.
• Animated Gradients: Pick from 6 curated presets or design your own linear/radial gradients with an interactive color editor and a GPU-accelerated liquid Aurora floating effect.
• Dark/Light Theme: Force light, dark, or system default schemes on a per-wallpaper basis.

📂 ORGANIZATION & LAYOUT
• Hierarchical Folder Tree: Navigate your monitored bookmarks structure via a sleek sidebar.
• 5 Visual Folder Modes: Choose the perfect layout per folder—List, Compact, Icons, Large Icons, or Quicklinks.
• Flexible Sorting: Sort bookmark cards globally or per-folder by original order, manual drag-and-drop, title, date added, domain name, or broken-first.
• Virtual Pinned Folder: Highlight your favorite bookmarks inside their folders and pin them to a top-level virtual directory for instant access.
• Frequent Sites: Optional virtual folder displaying your most visited sites using the browser's native Top Sites API.

🔍 POWERFUL TOOLS
• Accent-Insensitive Instant Search: Instantly filter bookmark title, URL, domain path, folders, and tags as you type.
• Smart Tagging: Create manual tags or let martabs generate automatic tags based on folder trees and URL structures.
• Link Health Checker: Validate your bookmarks for broken URLs, redirects, and offline pages directly from your dashboard.
• Local Usage Statistics: Visually track your clicks with a private, offline bar chart.
• Offline Captures: Optionally trigger local website screenshots when opening bookmarks to create offline visual previews.

🔒 PRIVACY & INFRASTRUCTURE
• 100% Offline: martabs never calls third-party preview engines, icon services, or data tracking servers. Everything is stored locally.
• Dynamic Permissions: Optional API permissions (like topSites or host-permissions for health checks) are requested only when enabling features and are immediately revoked when disabled.
• Portability: Export and import your entire configuration (including tags, slot themes, and local stats) with profile ID remapping.
• 11 Languages Supported: English, Spanish, Portuguese, German, French, Italian, Korean, Russian, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, and Japanese.
